println.description: Prints a value followed by a newline to standard output

print.description: Prints a value to standard output without a trailing newline

require.signature: def require(requirement: Boolean, message: => Any): Unit
require.description: Tests an expression, throwing an IllegalArgumentException if false

assert.signature: def assert(assertion: Boolean, message: => Any): Unit
assert.description: Tests an expression, throwing an AssertionError if false

sys.exit.description: Terminates the currently running JVM with the given status code

sys.error.description: Throws a RuntimeException with the given message

Some.apply.description: Creates an Option containing the given value

None.description: Represents the absence of a value in an Option

Left.apply.signature: def apply[A, B](value: A): Left[A, B]
Left.apply.description: Creates the left projection of an Either (typically an error)

Right.apply.signature: def apply[A, B](value: B): Right[A, B]
Right.apply.description: Creates the right projection of an Either (typically a success value)

List.apply.description: Creates a new immutable list with the given elements

Map.apply.signature: def apply[K, V](elems: (K, V)*): Map[K, V]
Map.apply.description: Creates a new immutable map with the given key-value pairs

Set.apply.description: Creates a new immutable set with the given elements

Vector.apply.description: Creates a new immutable vector with the given elements

Array.apply.description: Creates a new array with the given elements

Option.apply.description: Creates an Option from a nullable value; returns None if null

Try.apply.description: Wraps a computation in a Try, catching non-fatal exceptions

Future.apply.signature: def apply[T](body: => T)(implicit executor: ExecutionContext): Future[T]
Future.apply.description: Starts an asynchronous computation and returns a Future holding the result

Future.sequence.signature: def sequence[A](in: IterableOnce[Future[A]])(implicit executor: ExecutionContext): Future[List[A]]
Future.sequence.description: Transforms a collection of Futures into a Future of a collection

Future.successful.description: Creates an already completed Future with the given value

Future.failed.description: Creates an already failed Future with the given exception

Await.result.signature: def result[T](awaitable: Awaitable[T], atMost: Duration): T
Await.result.description: Blocks until the awaitable completes or the timeout expires

Promise.apply.description: Creates a new Promise that can be completed to produce a Future

Source.fromFile.signature: def fromFile(name: String)(implicit codec: Codec): BufferedSource
Source.fromFile.description: Creates a source from the given filename for reading text

Using.apply.signature: def apply[R: Releasable, A](resource: => R)(f: R => A): Try[A]
Using.apply.description: Performs an operation using a resource, ensuring the resource is released afterwards

LazyList.from.description: Creates an infinite lazy list of integers starting from the given value

Iterator.apply.description: Creates an iterator over the given elements

Seq.apply.description: Creates a new sequence with the given elements

Range.apply.signature: def apply(start: Int, end: Int): Range
Range.apply.description: Creates a range of integers from start (inclusive) to end (exclusive)

Ordering.by.signature: def by[T, S](f: T => S)(implicit ord: Ordering[S]): Ordering[T]
Ordering.by.description: Creates an ordering based on a mapping function

implicitly.description: Summons an implicit value of the given type

summon.description: Summons a given instance of the specified type (Scala 3)

identity.description: Returns its argument unchanged; the identity function

locally.description: Used to create a local block for clarity without introducing a new scope

classOf.description: Returns the runtime Class object for the given type

isInstanceOf.description: Tests whether the object is an instance of the given type

asInstanceOf.description: Casts the object to the given type

toString.description: Returns a string representation of the object

hashCode.description: Returns a hash code value for the object

equals.description: Compares this object with another for equality
